title: CDS View built on top of another CDS view (base view)
description: CDS View built on top of another CDS view (base view). Key topics: A CDS view can SELECT from another CDS view (not just tables). This is the foundation of the VDM layering model. Views can be stacked: Table → Basic View → Composite → Consumption.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆A CDS view can SELECT from another CDS view (not just tables)
◆This is the foundation of the VDM layering model
◆Views can be stacked: Table → Basic View → Composite → Consumption
◆Performance consideration: Each layer adds complexity; the HANA
◆@Semantics annotations should be applied at each layer as needed

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆A CDS view can SELECT from another CDS view (not just tables)
◆This is the foundation of the VDM layering model
◆Views can be stacked: Table → Basic View → Composite → Consumption
◆Performance consideration: Each layer adds complexity; the HANA
◆@Semantics annotations should be applied at each layer as needed

CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_VON_V'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - View on another CDS view (/DMO/I_Travel_D)'
define view ZPRAC_CDS_VIEW_ON_VIEW
  as select from /DMO/I_Travel_D
{
  key TravelUUID,
      TravelID,
      AgencyID,
      CustomerID,
      @Semantics.date: true
      BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      BookingFee,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      TotalPrice,
      CurrencyCode,
      Description
}
details:
optimizer compiles the chain into one SQL, but very deep stacks

can impact readability and maintenance

STANDARD BASE VIEW USED:

/DMO/I_Travel_D — SAP's standard interface view for Travel data

This is a SAP-delivered CDS view under the /DMO/ namespace

WHEN TO USE:

- Adding business logic on top of existing views

- Creating specialized subsets for different consumers (Fiori, Analytics)

- Applying different authorization checks at different layers
